response.justification: While Bogdan demonstrates exceptional software engineering breadth with 20+ years of experience and strong DevOps practices, this role is a critical mismatch. The role explicitly requires native-level Japanese proficiency, which is entirely absent from the resume—a hard requirement that disqualifies him immediately. Additionally, the position demands embedded firmware expertise, security technologies (MACsec, 802.1X, encryption), and networking fundamentals, none of which appear in his background. His last significant C/C++ work was in 2007-2008 (18+ years ago), and his recent career has focused on web/mobile/cloud technologies rather than embedded systems or security domains.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (20+ years) with strong emphasis on code quality, TDD, and CI/CD practices
Proven ability to master multiple programming languages and technical domains across web, mobile, and infrastructure
Deep DevOps and infrastructure expertise with Docker, Kubernetes, and build systems—relevant for development environment management
concerns: Native-level Japanese proficiency is a required qualification and is completely absent from the resume
C programming experience is outdated (last work in 2007-2008); recent 15+ years focused on TypeScript/Node.js, not systems-level languages
No demonstrated background in embedded firmware, network security technologies (802.1X, MACsec, Captive Portal), networking fundamentals (Layer 2/3, SNMP, NETCONF), or switch/hardware knowledge

key_factors.factor: Embedded systems and security domain expertise
